S-01.notes: Two-column dense grid layout per D3+2 density; submit-on-Enter per D1+1 speed and D2+1 power. inline-validation rendered inline via wf-validation-error class (DS-conventional, not a separate catalogue pattern). file-upload (T3 stub) is composed inside single-form per pattern-bindings Section 1.

S-02.notes: Table.compact composed with inline-edit on the Priority column (D3+2 + D1+1 → editable variant per registry Section 3); 9 visible columns + bulk-select checkbox column (density-+2 raises column budget per pattern-bindings Section 3); modal-confirmation gates destructive Cancel/Retry actions per GR-04 default focus on Cancel.

S-03.notes: 8 KPI tiles in a 4-column grid for high information density per D3+2; F-15 audit columns surface as tiles (uploaded-by, uploaded-at, FileSetting) rather than a separate audit panel. Per-tile error isolation rendered as the partial-error state. Small embedded FileProcessLog table is legal inside dashboard per composition-rules (may-contain: table-small).

S-04.notes: Table.compact at D3+2 with 8 visible columns (row#, field, value, reason code, reason text, BR rule, action, bulk-select); per-row Retry action wrapped in modal-confirmation per GR-04 because retry is destructive at FileProcessLog level (overwrites the prior outcome row). Bulk-retry on selected rows fits D1+1 speed posture.
